mutated_statement: which group finished both first and last?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Conjunctive quantifier addition (logical contradiction): "team" → "group" | adds "both ... and last" to "finished first?" → "finished both first and last?" (introduces an impossible/ambiguous requirement)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中多次明确指出正确答案应为“None”（冠军为Persepolis，垫底为Malavan，二者不在同一组）以及critic多次批评agent仅反复调用不被允许的simple_query且未给出推理或答案；agent整段行为特征是机械重复无效操作（反复simple_query、输出为空），既未提出澄清问题也未尝试在语义上修正或合理化矛盾。因无任何识别、解释或纠正矛盾的迹象，故归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”。
